title: Adding a view to a board via GraphQL?
excerpt: Had a look through the documentation but I’m not too sure if this is possible, am I able to use GraphQL to add a new view to a selected board?

posts.author: Aurimas (Aurimas Karvelis)
posts.cookedHtml: Had a look through the documentation but I’m not too sure if this is possible, am I able to use GraphQL to add a new view to a selected board?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Aurimas and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, there is no way of adding a new view to a board via our API.

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Aurimas (Aurimas Karvelis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Matias,

Ah that’s a shame, I need to rethink my entire application I’ll get it there in the end!

Thanks for getting back to me regarding this.

Thanks,
Aurimas

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @Aurimas,

You’ll get there for sure!

Let us know if we can help with anything else

Cheers,
Matias
